name: Beibu Gulf Port Co., Ltd.
summary: Beibu Gulf Port Co., Ltd. engages in the operation and management of Guangxi Beibu Gulf Port in China. The company offers port handling, storage, and shipping port services, as well as engages in other business. Its cargo goods categories include container, coal, ore, grain, metallic ore, and others. The company was formerly known as Beibuwan port Co., ltd. Beibu Gulf Port Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Beihai, China.
